property.name: git.commit.message.full
property.value:
Add test for duplicate pet name during update
Signed-off-by: sumituppal03 <sumituppal2004@gmail.com>

property.name: git.commit.message.short
property.value: Add test for duplicate pet name during update

testcase.name: findAll
testcase.system-out:
